title: Integrate Plus for monday.com vs native Slack integration

posts.author: asharma (Ankur Sharma - Upscale (Part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there

Ever wondered how Integrate Plus for monday.com fares against the native monday.com <> Slack integration?

Well, not anymore! We put together a comparison chart to help you visualize the additional value Integrate Plus adds over the native integration:

image2000×964 373 KB

Should you want to see how our app looks like in action, we also put together a playlist of quick videos showing the capabilities of our app.
